name: Last World
description: A 2D platform game is a type of video game where the main character navigates through a two-dimensional environment while avoiding obstacles and enemies. In this specific game, the main player is a young boy who is on a mission to escape the spell of witches and skeletons. There are 10 episodes in total, each one presenting new challenges and obstacles for the player to overcome. The young boy must avoid contact with the witches and skeletons, as touching them will result in game over. To navigate through the environment, the boy must be careful to avoid wooden and metal stakes that are scattered throughout the levels. These stakes can obstr
instructions: Up Right Left Arrow to move and to Shot the gun Click Left Mouse Button - By the way watch out for the witch and the skeleton
tags: 1 Player, Action, Adventure, Boy, Game, World
